name: Svix

seo.title: Svix Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score

review.verdict: Svix is a Developer Portals / API Management tool.
pros: Centralizes API governance, docs, and rate limiting
cons: Adds an extra network hop and operational layer
review.best_for: Enterprises exposing APIs to partners or public
